entries.name: extractDocs
entries.description:
Extracts JSDoc documentation from source files in specified directories.

This function recursively searches directories for source files matching
the include/exclude patterns, then extracts all documented items (functions,
classes, interfaces, types) from those files.

## Process

1. **File Discovery**: Recursively walks directories, applying filters
2. **File Reading**: Loads each matching file's content
3. **JSDoc Extraction**: Parses JSDoc comments using the native parser
4. **Declaration Matching**: Pairs JSDoc comments with source declarations
5. **Result Collection**: Aggregates extracted documentation by file

## Include/Exclude Patterns

Patterns support:
- `**` - Match any directory structure
- `*` - Match any filename
- Standard glob patterns (e.g., `**\/*.test.ts`)

## Performance Considerations

- Uses filesystem I/O which can be slow for large codebases
- Consider using more specific include patterns to reduce file scanning
- Results are not cached; call once per build/dev session

params.name: srcDirs
params.description: Array of source directory paths to scan

returns.description:
Promise resolving to array of extracted documentation by file.
         Each ExtractedDocs object contains file path and array of DocEntry items.

entries.signature: export async function extractDocs(srcDirs: string[], options: ResolvedDocsOptions): Promise<ExtractedDocs[]>

entries.description: Writes generated documentation to the output directory.

entries.name: MarkdownLintStandardDictionaryOptions
entries.description:
Opt-in standard dictionary sources.

The default provider uses CSpell dictionary packages because those packages
are actively maintained and expose locale-specific dictionaries in a stable
config format. Languages without a bundled preset can still be added through
custom `imports`.

members.name: languages
members.description:
Languages whose default standard dictionaries should be enabled.

Built-in preset package mappings currently exist for `en`, `fr`, `de`,
and `pl`. For other languages, use `imports`.

members.name: imports
members.description:
Additional CSpell-compatible imports.

This can point at installed packages like
`@cspell/dict-fr-fr/cspell-ext.json` or local CSpell config files.

members.name: resolveImportsRelativeTo
members.description: Base URL or path used when resolving `imports`.

members.description: Extra words to allow per language.

members.name: ignoredWords
members.description: Words that should never produce diagnostics.

members.name: standard
members.description:
Opt-in standard dictionary datasets.

By default the linter stays on a minimal built-in dictionary. Enable this
to load larger locale dictionaries from a standard external source.

entries.name: resolveTemplate
entries.description:
Resolves the template function from options.

Dispatches by file extension:
- `.vue`  → Vue SFC (SSR via vue/server-renderer)
- `.svelte` → Svelte SFC (SSR via svelte/server)
- `.tsx`/`.jsx` → React Server Component (SSR via react-dom/server)
- others → TypeScript template (direct function export)
entries.signature: async function resolveTemplate(options: ResolvedOgImageOptions, root: string): Promise<OgImageTemplateFn>

entries.name: resolveTsTemplate
entries.description: Resolves a plain TypeScript template (existing behavior).
entries.signature: async function resolveTsTemplate(templatePath: string, options: ResolvedOgImageOptions, root: string): Promise<OgImageTemplateFn>

entries.name: resolveVueTemplate
entries.description:
Resolves a Vue SFC template via SSR.

Compiles the SFC with @vue/compiler-sfc (or @vizejs/vite-plugin),
bundles with rolldown, then wraps with createSSRApp + renderToString.
entries.signature: async function resolveVueTemplate(templatePath: string, options: ResolvedOgImageOptions, root: string): Promise<OgImageTemplateFn>

entries.name: createVueCompilerPlugin
entries.description: Creates a rolldown plugin that compiles Vue SFCs using @vue/compiler-sfc.

entries.name: getVizejsPlugin
entries.description: Loads @vizejs/vite-plugin as a rolldown plugin for Vue SFC compilation.

entries.name: resolveSvelteTemplate
entries.description:
Resolves a Svelte SFC template via SSR.

Compiles the SFC with svelte/compiler (server mode + runes),
bundles with rolldown, then wraps with svelte/server render().
entries.signature: async function resolveSvelteTemplate(templatePath: string, root: string): Promise<OgImageTemplateFn>

entries.name: createSvelteCompilerPlugin
entries.description: Creates a rolldown plugin that compiles Svelte SFCs using svelte/compiler.

entries.name: resolveReactTemplate
entries.description:
Resolves a React (.tsx/.jsx) template via SSR.

Bundles with rolldown (JSX transform), then wraps with
react-dom/server renderToReadableStream for async Server Component support.
entries.signature: async function resolveReactTemplate(templatePath: string, root: string): Promise<OgImageTemplateFn>

entries.description:
Computes a stable template source identifier for cache keys.

For custom templates, hashes the file content so cache invalidates
when the template changes. For the default template, returns a fixed string.
entries.signature: async function computeTemplateSource(options: ResolvedOgImageOptions, root: string): Promise<string>

entries.name: generateOgImages
entries.description:
Generates OG images for a batch of pages.

Manages the full lifecycle: resolve template → launch browser (with `using`) →
render each page (with caching and concurrency).

All errors are non-fatal: failures are reported in results but never throw.

members.name: template
members.description:
Path to a custom template file (.ts, .vue, .svelte, .tsx/.jsx).
- `.ts`: default-export a function `(props) => string`
- `.vue`: Vue SFC, rendered via SSR
- `.svelte`: Svelte SFC, rendered via SSR
- `.tsx`/`.jsx`: React Server Component, rendered via SSR
If not specified, the built-in default template is used.

entries.name: MermaidSvgProtection
entries.description:
Protects mermaid SVG content from rehype HTML5 parser corruption. rehypeParse + rehypeStringify converts `
` in SVG foreignObject to `

`, which HTML5 interprets as 2
elements. Each rehype pass doubles them: 1 → 2 → 4 → 8 → 16. This module extracts ox-mermaid SVG blocks into placeholders before rehype processing and restores them after.

entries.name: protectMermaidSvgs
entries.description:
Extract `
...
` blocks and replace with HTML comment placeholders that rehype will preserve.

entries.name: restoreMermaidSvgs
entries.description: Restore protected mermaid SVG blocks from placeholders.
entries.signature: export function restoreMermaidSvgs(html: string, svgs: Map<string, string>): string

Transforms mermaid code blocks in HTML to rendered SVG diagrams.
Uses the native Rust NAPI transformMermaid function.

tags.deprecated: No longer used. Mermaid rendering is now done at build time via NAPI.

entries.name: NapiBindings
entries.description:
NAPI bindings for Rust-based Markdown processing.

Provides access to compiled Rust functions for high-performance
Markdown parsing and rendering operations.

members.name: parseAndRender
members.description:
Simple Markdown parser and renderer in one step.
Faster for simple use cases but lacks advanced features.

members.name: transform
members.description:
Full-featured Markdown transformation pipeline.
Handles frontmatter extraction, TOC generation, and advanced parsing.

returns.description: Transformed result with HTML, metadata, and TOC

members.name: generateOgImageSvg
members.description: Generates an OG image as SVG.

members.name: mergeHighlightedCodeBlocks
members.description: Restores code block metadata after JavaScript-side syntax highlighting.

returns.description: Highlighted HTML with original code block metadata reapplied

entries.name: OgImageData
entries.description: OG image data for generating social media preview images.

entries.name: OgImageConfig
entries.description: OG image configuration.

entries.name: JsTransformOptions
entries.description:
Options for Rust-based Markdown transformation.

Controls which Markdown extensions and features are enabled
during parsing and rendering.

members.name: gfm
members.description:
Enable GitHub Flavored Markdown extensions.
Includes tables, task lists, strikethrough, and autolinks.

members.name: taskLists
members.description: Enable task list syntax (- [ ] unchecked, - [x] checked).

members.name: tables
members.description:
Enable table rendering (GFM extension).
Requires GFM to be enabled for full functionality.

members.name: strikethrough
members.description:
Enable strikethrough syntax (~~text~~).
Requires GFM to be enabled.

members.name: autolinks
members.description: Enable automatic link conversion (URLs become clickable).

members.name: tocMaxDepth
members.description:
Maximum heading depth for table of contents.
Headings deeper than this level are excluded from TOC.

members.name: convertMdLinks
members.description: Convert `.md` links to `.html` links for SSG output.

members.name: baseUrl
members.description: Base URL for absolute link conversion (e.g., "/" or "/docs/").

members.name: sourcePath
members.description:
Source file path for relative link resolution.
Used to determine if the current file is an index file.

members.name: codeAnnotations
members.description: Enable line annotations for code blocks using fence meta.

members.name: codeAnnotationMetaKey
members.description: Fence meta key used to read code annotations.

members.name: codeAnnotationDefaultLineNumbers
members.description: Enable line numbers for all code blocks by default.

entries.name: SsgTransformOptions
entries.description: SSG-specific transform options.

members.name: baseUrl
members.description: Base URL for absolute link conversion

members.name: sourcePath
members.description: Source file path for relative link resolution

entries.name: generateModuleCode
entries.description: Generates the JavaScript module code.
entries.signature: function generateModuleCode(html: string, frontmatter: Record<string, unknown>, toc: TocEntry[], filePath: string, _options: ResolvedOptions): string

entries.name: extractImports
entries.description:
Extracts imports from Markdown content.

Supports importing components for interactive islands.

entries.name: generateOgImageSvg
entries.description:
Generates an OG image SVG using the Rust-based generator.

This function uses the Rust NAPI bindings to generate SVG-based
OG images for social media previews. The SVG can be served directly
or converted to PNG/JPEG for broader compatibility.

In the future, custom JS templates can be provided to override
the default Rust-based template.

returns.description: SVG string or null if NAPI bindings are unavailable

entries.signature: export async function generateOgImageSvg(data: OgImageData, config?: OgImageConfig): Promise<string | null>

entries.name: HeroAction
entries.description: Hero section action button.

entries.name: HeroImage
entries.description: Hero section image configuration.

entries.name: HeroNotice
entries.description: Hero notice configuration.

entries.name: HeroConfig
entries.description: Hero section configuration for entry page.

members.name: notice
members.description: Notice shown near the top of the hero

entries.name: FeatureConfig
entries.description: Feature card for entry page.

members.name: icon
members.description: Icon - supports: "mdi:icon-name" (Iconify), image URL, or emoji

entries.name: EntryPageConfig
entries.description: Entry page frontmatter configuration.

members.name: layout
members.description: Layout type - set to 'entry' for entry page

entries.name: SsgNavigationItem
entries.description: Navigation item for SSG sidebar rendering.

members.name: path
members.description:
Route path used for active-state matching.
Internal links should use site-relative paths such as `/getting-started`.

members.name: href
members.description:
Final href used in the rendered HTML.
When omitted for internal links, ox-content derives it from `path`.

entries.name: SsgNavigationGroup
entries.description: Navigation group for SSG sidebar rendering.

entries.name: SsgOptions
entries.description: SSG (Static Site Generation) options.

members.name: bare
members.description:
Bare HTML output (no navigation, no styles).
Useful for benchmarking or when using custom layouts.

members.name: siteName
members.description: Site name for header and title suffix.

members.name: ogImage
members.description:
OG image URL for social sharing (static URL).
If generateOgImage is enabled, this serves as the fallback.

members.name: generateOgImage
members.description:
Generate OG images per page using Rust-based generator.
When enabled, each page will have a unique OG image.

members.name: lastUpdated
members.description: Add each page's last git commit timestamp to the default theme.

members.name: siteUrl
members.description:
Site URL for generating absolute OG image URLs.
Required for proper SNS sharing.
Example: 'https://example.com'

members.name: theme
members.description:
Theme configuration for customizing the SSG output.
Use defineTheme() to create a theme configuration.

members.name: navigation
members.description:
Override the auto-generated sidebar navigation.
Useful when migrating from tools with explicit navigation config such as VitePress.

entries.name: ResolvedSsgOptions
entries.description: Resolved SSG options.

entries.name: OxContentOptions
entries.description: Plugin options.

members.name: ssg
members.description:
SSG (Static Site Generation) options.
Set to false to disable SSG completely.

members.name: highlight
members.description: Enable syntax highlighting for code blocks.

members.name: highlightLangs
members.description:
Additional languages for syntax highlighting.
Accepts Shiki LanguageRegistration objects (e.g., TextMate grammars).
These are loaded alongside the built-in languages.

members.name: codeAnnotations
members.description:
Opt-in code block annotations for fenced code blocks.

Supports the configurable attribute syntax by default, and can also opt
into VitePress-compatible fence metadata and inline notation.

Example:
` ```ts annotate="highlight:1,3-4;warning:6;error:7" `

members.name: docs
members.description:
Source documentation generation options.
Set to false to disable (opt-out).

members.name: search
members.description:
Full-text search options.
Set to false to disable search.

members.name: ogViewer
members.description:
Enable OG Viewer dev tool.
Accessible at /__og-viewer during development.

members.name: embeds
members.description:
Built-in static embeds rendered during Markdown transformation.
Set to `false` to disable all built-in embeds.

members.name: i18n
members.description:
i18n (internationalization) options.
Set to false to disable i18n.

entries.name: ResolvedOptions
entries.description: Resolved options with all defaults applied.

entries.name: BuiltinEmbedOptions
entries.description: Built-in embed configuration.

members.name: github
members.description:
Render `<GitHub repo="owner/name" />` repository cards.
Pass an options object to configure fetching.

members.name: openGraph
members.description:
Render `<OgCard url="https://example.com" />` Open Graph link cards.
Pass an options object to configure fetching.

entries.name: ResolvedBuiltinEmbedOptions
entries.description: Resolved built-in embed configuration.

entries.name: CodeAnnotationKind
entries.description: Supported line annotation kinds for code blocks.

entries.name: CodeAnnotationSyntax
entries.description: Supported code annotation syntaxes.

entries.name: CodeAnnotationsOptions
entries.description: Opt-in code annotation configuration.

members.name: notation
members.description:
Annotation syntax to enable.

- `attribute`: custom attribute syntax like `annotate="highlight:1,3-4"`
- `vitepress`: VitePress-compatible syntax like `{1,3-4}` and `[!code warning]`
- `both`: enables both syntaxes

members.name: metaKey
members.description:
Attribute name read from the code fence meta string.

Example: `annotate="highlight:1,3-4;warning:6"`

members.name: defaultLineNumbers
members.description:
Enable line numbers for all code blocks by default.

In `vitepress` or `both` mode, fenced code blocks can override this with
`:line-numbers`, `:line-numbers=<start>`, or `:no-line-numbers`.

entries.name: ResolvedCodeAnnotationsOptions
entries.description: Resolved code annotation configuration.

entries.name: OgImageOptions
entries.description:
OG image generation options.
Uses Chromium-based rendering with customizable templates.

members.name: template
members.description:
Path to a custom template file (.ts, .vue, .svelte, .tsx/.jsx).
- `.ts`: default-export a function `(props) => string`
- `.vue`: Vue SFC, rendered via SSR
- `.svelte`: Svelte SFC, rendered via SSR
- `.tsx`/`.jsx`: React Server Component, rendered via SSR
If not specified, the built-in default template is used.

members.name: vuePlugin
members.description:
Vue plugin to use for compiling `.vue` templates.
- `'vitejs'`: Use `@vue/compiler-sfc` (official, default)
- `'vizejs'`: Use `@vizejs/vite-plugin` (Rust-based)

members.name: cache
members.description:
Enable content-hash based caching.
Skips rendering when content hasn't changed.

members.name: concurrency
members.description: Number of concurrent page instances for parallel rendering.

entries.name: ResolvedOgImageOptions
entries.description: Resolved OG image options with all defaults applied.

entries.name: MarkdownTransformer
entries.description: Custom AST transformer.

entries.name: TransformContext
entries.description: Transform context passed to transformers.

entries.name: MarkdownNode
entries.description: Markdown AST node (simplified for TypeScript).

entries.name: TransformResult
entries.description: Transform result.

members.name: map
members.description: Source map (null means no source map).

entries.name: TocEntry
entries.description: Table of contents entry.

entries.name: DocsEntryPoint
entries.description: Public API entry point for grouped documentation.

entries.name: ResolvedDocsEntryPoint
entries.description: Resolved public API entry point.

entries.name: DocsOptions

members.name: include
members.description: Glob patterns for files to include.

members.name: exclude

members.name: entryPoints
members.description: Public API entry points used to group re-exported docs.

members.name: toc
members.description: Generate table of contents for each file.

members.name: groupBy
members.description: Group documentation by file or category.

members.name: githubUrl
members.description:
GitHub repository URL for source code links.
When provided, generated documentation will include links to source code.
Example: 'https://github.com/ubugeeei/ox-content'

members.name: basePath
members.description:
Route prefix used by generated documentation links and nav metadata.
Nav metadata falls back to '/api' when this is not set.

entries.description: A member belonging to a class, interface, type alias, or enum entry.

entries.description: Parameter documentation.

entries.name: ReturnDoc

entries.name: ExtractedDocs

entries.name: DocsSummary

entries.description: Machine-readable payload emitted alongside generated docs.

entries.name: SearchOptions
entries.description: Options for full-text search.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: Placeholder text for the search input.

members.name: hotkey
members.description: Keyboard shortcut to focus search (without modifier).

entries.description: Resolved search options.

entries.name: SearchDocument
entries.description: Search document structure.

entries.name: SearchResult
entries.description: Search result structure.

entries.name: ScopedSearchQuery
entries.description: Parsed search query with optional scope prefixes.

entries.name: LocaleConfig
entries.description: Locale configuration.

members.name: name
members.description: Display name for this locale (e.g., 'English', '日本語').

entries.name: I18nOptions
entries.description: i18n (internationalization) options.

members.name: dir
members.description: Path to i18n dictionary directory (relative to project root).

members.name: hideDefaultLocale
members.description:
Hide default locale prefix in URLs.
When true, `/page` serves the default locale and `/ja/page` serves Japanese.
When false, all locales get prefixed: `/en/page`, `/ja/page`.

members.name: functionNames
members.description: Translation function names to detect in source code.

entries.name: ResolvedI18nOptions
entries.description: Resolved i18n options with all defaults applied.

entries.name: convertVitePressSidebar
entries.description:
Converts a VitePress sidebar config into ox-content navigation groups.
Nested VitePress items are flattened into the nearest ox-content group.

entries.name: convertVitePressNav
entries.description:
Converts VitePress top navigation into ox-content sidebar groups.
This is used as a fallback when no explicit sidebar is defined.

entries.name: fromVitePressConfig
entries.description: Creates ox-content plugin options from an existing VitePress config.
entries.signature: export function fromVitePressConfig(config: VitePressConfig, overrides: OxContentOptions = {}): OxContentOptions

entries.name: generateVitePressMigrationConfig
entries.description:
Generates a TypeScript module exporting migrated ox-content options.

This is used by the migration CLI so users can inspect and edit the resulting
object instead of keeping a runtime dependency on their VitePress config.
entries.signature: export function generateVitePressMigrationConfig(config: VitePressConfig, overrides: OxContentOptions = {}, options: GenerateVitePressMigrationConfigOptions = {}): string

entries.name: normalizeVitePressFrontmatter
entries.description: Normalizes VitePress-specific frontmatter into ox-content's entry-page shape.
entries.signature: export function normalizeVitePressFrontmatter(frontmatter: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown>
